summary: Phase 8 Testing: Library, AI Assistant, and Theme Color Features. Backend: 18/18 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. Fixed 2 bugs during testing.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Club update endpoint missing color fields in allowed_fields
AI chat history methods using wrong API (add_user_message/add_assistant_message)
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to directly append to chat.messages list with proper format

seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed library items created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 8 features fully functional: 1) Club Page theme color selection with 8 predefined palettes (Verde Clássico, Azul Real, Vermelho Paixão, Verde Lima, Roxo Elegante, Azul Celeste, Laranja Vibrante, Rosa Moderno), 2) Library Page with full CRUD for links/videos/PDFs with category filtering, 3) AI Assistant using emergentintegrations with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY working correctly.

theme_color_selection.description: 8 color palettes available in Club edit mode, colors persist after save

theme_color_persistence.description: Colors saved to database and applied globally via ThemeContext

library_create_link.description: Create link type library items with title, URL, description, category

library_create_video.description: Create video type items with YouTube thumbnail generation

library_filter_category.description: Filter library items by category (Regras, Táticas, Treino, etc.)

library_filter_type.description: Filter library items by type (link, video, pdf)

library_delete.description: Delete library items with confirmation dialog

ai_assistant_open_close.description: AI Assistant panel opens via sparkle button, closes with Escape

ai_assistant_send_message.description: Send messages to AI and receive responses

ai_assistant_session.description: Session ID maintained for conversation context

ai_assistant_clear_history.description: Clear chat history via trash button
